title: Pull Me Up
description: Team climb mod: crouch at a ledge to pull your teammate up. Fast, smooth, and seamless.
body:
# PULL ME UP

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d80bf1d8103008422b2788752800841ee4c22384.jpeg)

A simple and immersive mod that allows players to help each other climb blocks and ledges. Teamwork makes the dream work!

## AS A HELPER:
**Shift + RMB** on a player to help them.

# ![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1e50c7efb2f31ad3514c2461924e3b154173f98a.gif)

## AS A TARGET:
**RMB** on a helper to climb up.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b25b57e7ad89c07969397e7a3cd0060424a9bbce.gif)
